_comment: Copy to ownership_assignments.json and edit. Run `node assign_ownership.js --list` first to see current owners and exhibit UUIDs. Owner is resolved via du_id (preferred), email, or user_id. Run with DRY_RUN=true first.

assignments._comment: Assign an exhibit + all its items/grids/timelines/headings (and single-exhibit media) to a user.
Same, but by email, and leave media owners untouched.

reassignments._comment: Move every record owned by one user to another (e.g. a curator left).
Claim all orphaned (owner=0) records for a user.
